updates.snippet: Official Announcement: Ontario Power Generation (OPG) has signed a contract for the next phase of the Darlington New Nuclear Project (DNNP) with GE Hitachi, targeting grid connection by 2029.
System Detected: Natura Resources laboratory reports successful 5,000-hour continuous operation of its molten salt cooling loop, with performance exceeding initial design parameters.
Under Review: AP300 has completed the initial technical assessment for Phase 1 of the Generic Design Assessment (GDA) submitted to the UK Office for Nuclear Regulation (ONR).
